3222190.name: The Last Storm
3222190.description:
The Last Storm is a 3D race game in which you will drive in the middle of the hot desert!

Get behind the wheel of a powerful SUV and head out into the vast desert! In this exciting racing game you will have to conquer sand dunes, make dangerous maneuvers and prove your skill in passing the toughest tracks in a limited time! Sudden obstacles, tight turns and challenging terrain are just a few of the challenges you'll face. So there's only one thing left to do - just go for it!


Game features:
- Different difficulty levels
- Beautiful graphics
- Pleasant music
